result.stdout:
Usage: parsisiust [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  AlbumURL                 URL of an album to download. E.g. https://www.pakartot.lt/album/sugar-space

Options:
  -b|--bytes               If set, will download only first few bytes of each song. Use this to verify command and to add extra load for pakartok.lt servers unnecessarily
  -f|--force               If set, already downloaded files will be overwritten
  -d|--destination         Base path to download music to. Defaults to current dir '.'
  -o|--output-path-format  Format of the target folder structure. Defaults to '{artist.name}/{album.name}'
  --file-format            File format. Defaults to '{track.number} - {track.title}.mp3'
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
